metadata.name: NetBird Network
metadata.description: Creates a NetBird network for organizing resources and routers.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Creates a NetBird network.

## Prerequisites
- Create an admin PAT for the NetBird management API before rendering `provider.tf`.
- Decide up front how you want to segment resources and routers inside the network because those references build on the network ID.

## Apply
- Render `provider.tf` and `main.tf`.
- Review the network name and optional description.
- Run `terraform fmt`, `terraform plan`, and `terraform apply`.

## References
- [NetBird Networks](https://docs.netbird.io/how-to/networks)
- [Terraform Resource](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/resources/network.md)

variables.name: network_description
variables.title: Description
variables.description: Optional description for the NetBird network.

variables.name: netbird_management_url
variables.title: Management URL
variables.description: NetBird Management API URL. Trailing slashes are trimmed. TLS certificates must be trusted by the OpenTofu runner because the provider does not expose a skip-verification option.

variables.name: netbird_tenant_account
variables.title: Tenant Account
variables.description: Optional tenant account ID for impersonation.
